name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Cash America Pawn at 220 E Main St, Crowley, TX 76036 is Mon-Fri 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM. Google reviewers rate the branch 3.0 stars across 58 reviews. Call +1 817-297-4470.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the leading international pawn store operator with over 3,300 retail locations across 29 U.S. states, the District of Columbia, the United Kingdom, and Latin America (including all Mexican states, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador). The company employs approximately 22,000 people and is listed on both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and Russell 2000 Index, indicating its scale and legitimacy as a public company.

FirstCash's core business focuses on serving cash and credit-constrained consumers through pawn loans and retail merchandise sales. Their pawn loans are non-recourse agreements secured by pledged personal property, meaning customers pledge items as collateral rather than undergoing credit checks. The company buys and sells a wide variety of merchandise including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments. Beyond pawn loans, FirstCash offers layaway services (requiring 10% down), gold and precious metal purchasing, and retail sales of previously pawned merchandise.

FirstCash distinguishes itself through its massive geographic footprint—operating more than 3,300 stores makes it significantly larger than typical regional pawn operators. The company also operates AFF, a wholly owned subsidiary providing lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through over 15,000 retail merchant partner locations, diversifying beyond traditional pawn operations. Their focus on immediate cash transactions and non-recourse loans differentiates them from traditional lenders that require credit evaluation.

For consumers, FirstCash provides fast access to cash without credit checks, making it accessible to those with poor credit or no credit history. However, pawn loans typically carry higher implicit costs through low item valuations, and customers risk losing pledged items if unable to repay. The layaway service offers an alternative to credit but requires upfront capital. While FirstCash's size provides stability and convenience through numerous locations, the fundamental economics of pawn lending mean this is best suited as a last-resort option rather than a primary financial strategy.
pros: Massive network of 3,300+ stores across 29 U.S. states plus UK and Latin America—convenient access and legitimate public company with S&P/Russell 2000 listing
Non-recourse pawn loans require no credit check or approval process—fast cash for anyone with valuable collateral regardless of credit history
Immediate cash transactions—get money on the spot when items are evaluated and accepted
Wide range of accepted items—buys jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments and 'almost anything of value'
Layaway service available—allows purchases with just 10% down for those without immediate full payment ability
Gold and precious metal purchasing—specialized service for common household items (jewelry, silver, platinum) for quick cash
Retail merchandise sales—customers can buy previously pawned items at potentially discounted prices
cons: Implicit high costs through undervaluation of items—customers typically receive significantly less than resale value or replacement cost for pledged items
Risk of permanent loss—failure to repay within the loan term results in forfeiture of pledged personal property with no recourse
Limited transparency on loan terms—website does not clearly disclose interest rates, loan periods, or valuation methodology
Pawn loans encourage financial dependency—designed primarily for cash-constrained consumers without better alternatives rather than building financial stability
Collateral-based lending perpetuates a cycle—vulnerable consumers pledge valuable personal items, lose them if unable to repay, further straining their circumstances
best_for: Individuals needing immediate emergency cash who lack access to credit or have poor credit history
People with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, instruments) they can temporarily part with in exchange for quick funds
Consumers preferring to avoid credit checks and formal loan approval processes
Those seeking layaway alternatives for purchases requiring upfront capital or installment payments
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for consumers facing genuine financial emergencies who have valuable items to pledge and cannot access traditional credit, but primarily serves as a last-resort option rather than a sustainable financial solution. The critical caveat is that pawn lending inherently disadvantages vulnerable populations through low item valuations and risk of asset loss, making it suitable only for short-term cash needs, not ongoing financial management.
services: Pawn loans secured by pledged personal property (non-recourse)
Gold, silver, and precious metal purchasing for immediate cash
Retail sales of used merchandise (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments)
Layaway service with 10% down payment requirement
Item evaluation and in-store valuation services
Store locator to find nearest FirstCash location
Lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through AFF subsidiary
Cash advance against personal property collateral
Buy and sell marketplace for general merchandise
